title: Jamaican Paella
description: A flavorful and spicy paella dish inspired by the Caribbean, featuring smoky sausage and a hint of Jamaican jerk seasoning.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the Smoky Sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the Roasted Onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the Jamaican Jerk Seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Paella and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and cover with a lid.
Simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is cooked.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
